GC-CLOUD WAVE 4 — DIRECTOR'S BRIEFING NOTE
Date: March 3, 2026
Prepared by: Carol Nguyen, Project Manager
For: Director Okafor

PROJECT HEALTH SUMMARY

I am pleased to report that GC-Cloud Wave 4 is performing well across
all key indicators. The project remains on track to meet its Q3 2026
delivery commitment.

SCHEDULE: The project is progressing according to the approved baseline
schedule. The infrastructure assessment phase concluded on time on
February 25. We are now entering the procurement and planning phase as
planned.

BUDGET: The project is within budget. Expenditures to date total
$412,000 against an approved budget of $2,400,000 (17% spent). We have
no budget concerns at this time and expect to deliver within the
approved envelope.

RISKS: The project risk profile is low. Our risk register contains
three risks, all rated Low. No risk escalations are required.

STAKEHOLDERS: Engagement with client departments is positive. The
working group meetings have been productive and departments are
aligned on the migration approach.

OUTLOOK: The team is well-positioned to execute the procurement phase
and we anticipate issuing the RFP in mid-March as planned. No issues
are anticipated.
